backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a campus complaint management system with role-based access control, user profile CRUD, and complaint lifecycle management (create, update status, view) enforced via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'Delete Account' feature to its implementing files (AppHeader, DeleteAccountDialog, useQueries) with associated components, test IDs, and high confidence rating.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the CampusVoice AI React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state, profile setup flow, and view routing, rendering either the landing page, profile setup modal, or the full sidebar+header app shell based on identity and profile status.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot widget with a collapsible chat window that sends user messages to the Gemini service, displays conversation history, and supports text-to-speech playback for assistant responses.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, emergency alert dialog, notification dropdown, user profile menu, and logout/delete account actions, adapting display based on campus role.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Role-aware sidebar navigation component that renders different nav items for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles, with logout and profile display.
frontend/src/components/ComplaintCard.ts: Card component for displaying a single complaint with status/priority badges, overdue indicator, media counts, and optional role-based student name masking for anonymous submissions.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountDia: Confirmation dialog that permanently deletes the user's account via mutation, clears related localStorage keys, and logs the user out.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: Full-screen overlay that displays an active emergency alert with student details and plays a siren, visible only to HOD/admin roles, with an acknowledge-and-dismiss action.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: Star-rating feedback form for resolved complaints that saves rating and optional comment to local metadata, with a read-only display mode for already-submitted feedback.
frontend/src/components/MediaUploader.ts: A React component that allows users to upload photos, videos, and audio files, converting them to data URLs and displaying previews in a grid with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup, collecting the user's name, email, campus role, and department, then saving the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/constants/appRoles.ts: Defines the CampusRole type and lookup records for role display labels and badge colors for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles.
frontend/src/constants/complaintCategori: Defines all complaint category constants grouped by domain (Academic, Infrastructure, Facilities, etc.) along with sensitive categories and a list of college departments.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides global app state including the authenticated user's extended profile, campus role, notifications, and emergency alerts, polling local storage every 5 seconds for updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and complaints via the ICP actor, including get, create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for a campus teal/navy color palette (light and dark modes), and adds utility component classes for status/priority badges and sidebar nav items.
frontend/src/lib/audioService.ts: Provides Web Audio API utilities to play a confirmation beep, an emergency siren of configurable duration, and to stop all audio by closing the AudioContext.
frontend/src/lib/complaintHelpers.ts: Utility functions for complaints including generating unique IDs, calculating deadlines based on priority, formatting timestamps, and checking if a complaint is overdue.
frontend/src/lib/geminiService.ts: Wraps the Gemini 2.0 Flash API to provide AI-powered complaint text analysis, image analysis, and a campus-context chatbot response function.
frontend/src/lib/localComplaintStore.ts: Manages localStorage persistence for extended complaint metadata (category, media, feedback), emergency alerts, and notifications that supplement the ICP backend's core data.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Provides functions to export a list of complaints as a downloadable JSON or CSV file, including summary statistics and formatted field values.
frontend/src/lib/userProfileHelpers.ts: Encodes and decodes extended user profile data (display name, campus role, department) into/from the ICP backend's UserProfile name field using a pipe-delimited format.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentity, and App providers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Displays complaint analytics with bar/pie charts for category, status, and priority distributions, plus AI-powered predictive analysis via Gemini and JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ChatbotPage.tsx: Simple page wrapper for the AI chatbot feature that directs users to the floating chat widget in the bottom-right corner.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsListPage.ts: Lists and filters complaints with search, status, and priority filters; supports role-based visibility (admin/HOD/staff/student), status updates, and CSV export.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Role-aware dashboard showing complaint statistics (total, registered, in-progress, resolved, high-priority) with navigation shortcuts tailored to student, staff, HOD, and admin roles.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyLogsPage.tsx: Displays a list of emergency alerts stored locally, allowing admins to acknowledge individual alerts or clear all logs with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, Internet Identity login button, and a feature highlights grid for the CampusVoice AI application.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaintPage.t: A form page for submitting campus complaints with fields for description, category, priority, and media uploads. Includes AI-powered analysis via Gemini to auto-suggest category/priority and saves complaint metadata locally.
frontend/src/pages/TrackComplaintsPage.t: Displays a filterable, searchable list of the current user's submitted complaints with status badges and a detail dialog. Supports CSV export and feedback submission.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: A placeholder admin page for user management that explains users are authenticated via Internet Identity and managed on-chain, with no interactive functionality yet.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended font families (Inter/Outfit), custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Campus Complaint Management System, its existing features (account deletion flow), and pending feature requests including a backend deleteAccount function.
